description_long: This is a casual slip-on shoe with a brown, soft-textured upper made from what appears to be canvas or a similar fabric. The shoe features a low-profile design with a rounded toe and a slightly raised heel, providing a relaxed and comfortable fit. The side panels have visible stitching and two small ventilation eyelets, while the interior lining displays a patterned fabric, likely for added comfort and style. The sole is flat and appears to be made of rubber, offering flexibility and grip suitable for urban walking. The shoe lacks any visible laces or fasteners, emphasizing its easy slip-on functionality. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A brown slip-on casual shoe with a soft canvas upper, patterned lining, and a flat rubber sole, designed for comfort and easy wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe and seamless slip-on design, with the upper material folding slightly over the sole.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low-profile silhouette, visible stitching, two ventilation eyelets, and the patterned interior lining.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel cup and the continuous brown upper, with the opening for the foot clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the same stitching, eyelets, and patterned lining.
